title: lathyrus koeieanus
intro: Lathyrus koeieanus, also known as Koeie's pea, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Lathyrus, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Lathyrus koeieanus include reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
